meaning: n.乡下人,土头土脑的人,反应迟钝的人
examples: I was just a hick from Texas then.
Nobody ever helped a hick but a hick himself.
Mr. COLEMAN: Well, to many, hick-hop music is a combination of my favorite country instruments.
Worcestershire, after winning the toss, were restricted to 141-8 with Graeme Hick top-scoring with 59.
